expectations.text: The proposed checks are explicitly idempotent — no side-effectful POSTs that mutate prod data without cleanup
expectations.evidence: Dropped template's POST happy-path; replaced with 2 auth-rejection POSTs that short-circuit before state mutation; explicit reasoning citing source lines

expectations.text: Output is in Rust (uses reqwest/cargo test or an equivalent Rust-native runner), not a script in another language
expectations.evidence: tests/smoke.rs using reqwest against SMOKE_BASE_URL — canonical Rust smoke shape adapted for live env

expectations.text: Distinguishes liveness/readiness from deeper route checks so the suite stays meaningful against a real deployed env
expectations.evidence: Health probe + known-user read + 4 negative-path checks — full coverage layered by depth
